Name: SyncStop Adapter (Data Blocker)
Short Description:
SyncStop prevents accidental data exchange when your device is connected to someone else's computer or a public charging station. SyncStop (data blocker) accomplishes this by blocking data transfer and allowing only electricity to pass. This minimizes the risks of installing malware and theft of data. Use it easily together with your normal cable. Compatible with 99% of the charging cables on the market. Works with both iPhone & Android.

Four alternatives to choose from: USB-A to USB-A  / USB-A to Type-C  /  Type-C to USB-A/  Type-C to Type-C

Skalet har hard baksida och kraftig kant vilket skyddar telefonen mot stotar. Mycket bra passform och saker greppkansla. Priset ar inkl. 1-fargstryck eller gravyr. Minsta antal med tryck 100st.
Short Description:
Unique cover with crystal epoxy technology. Place the phone on mirrors, windows, metal, whiteboard and many other flat surfaces. The cover have a hard backide and reinforced edges which absorbs shock. Great fit and secure grip feeling.

We have covers for the most common and very latest models on the market, if you are unsure please contact us.
